stdout:
Table	Create Table
quotes	CREATE TABLE `quotes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `quoteNumber` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `clientName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `clientContact` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `clientPhone` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `clientEmail` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectName` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectRef` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `vendorName` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `assistantName` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdByUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('open','approved','lost','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `currentVersion` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `totalAmount` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `seller1Id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `seller1Name` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `seller2Id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `seller2Name` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `assistantId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `rtPercent` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0',
  `rtDest1` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rtDest1Active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `rtDest2` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rtDest2Active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `rtDest3` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rtDest3Active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `marginPercent` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0.10',
  `freteType` enum('free','paid','night','consult') DEFAULT 'free',
  `freteIsento` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `freteLocalidade` enum('sp','other') DEFAULT 'sp',
  `totalFinal` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `revisionCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `deliveryDays` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '20',
  `commissionPercent` decimal(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.05',
  `paymentTerm` varchar(256) DEFAULT '30% Sinal e 70% a 28DDF (mediante aprovação de cadastro)',
  `destState` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `difalEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `difalPercent` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `fcpPercent` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `fcpEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `difalValue` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `fcpValue` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `projectNumber` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `freteValue` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `freteState` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `freteIncluded` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `commissionPercent2` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `quotes_quoteNumber_unique` (`quoteNumber`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=2190001
